title: BJP’s earning accounted for 85% of total income of national parties in 2024-25: ADR Report
description: According to the report analysing the declarations made by political parties to the Election Commission, six national parties (BJP, INC, CPI(M), AAP, BSP and NPEP) declared a total income of ₹7960.09 crore in 2024-25, and the BJP accounted for 85.03% of it
